title: Getting Fresh with Pinkfresh Studio & Giveaway
excerpt: Pinkfresh Studio is a company offering exclusive washi tapes and embellishments. They are launching their brand new enamel products along with their popular ombre washi in new colors on September 6th! They are super thrilled about these products and excited…
body:
Pinkfresh Studio is a company offering exclusive washi tapes and embellishments. They are launching their brand new enamel products along with their popular ombre washi in new colors on September 6th!

They are super thrilled about these products and excited to offer 15% off your entire purchase from (mark your calendars!) September 6 at 12:00 pm CST to September 8 11:59 pm CST. Use code AMY15OFF. Make sure to stop by their Facebook page and Instagram for updates. GIVEAWAY is closed.

Pinkfresh Studio is giving away $25.00 worth of gift certificates to 2 lucky blog readers. Leave a comment here about something you are looking forward to in September. This giveaway is open until September 6 at 12pm CST and a winner will be announced shortly after. Good luck!

Winners are: #45 & #92! CONGRATS

Ruth G says: September 1, 2013 at 7:26 pm

I am looking forward to lots of creative opportunities because I’m starting some design team work!

Ilissa says: September 2, 2013 at 9:41 am

Love the ombré washi, and brightness of them enamel goodness! For the month of September I look forward to my hubby being on vacation (hopefully not getting called in) and being able to shuffle the kids around, change my break pads and cook dinner everyday!
